description:
Operating Area: Croatia

PHANTOM Yacht, a stunning vessel that not only embodies opulence but also offers a thrilling experience on the seas. Phantom is a classy and luxurious yacht that speaks sophistication. This magnificent yacht boasts spacious and elegant interiors and sophisticated naval architecture exteriors, offering a James Bond lifestyle on the water. With a length of 85 feet, it is perfect for intimate navigation exploring hidden coves and majestic islands of Croatia or for daily social gatherings.

The yacht features an impressive array of amenities, including state-of-the-art navigation and safety systems, top-of-the-line entertainment systems, and high-end furniture and fittings. The Phantom 85 can accommodate up to 8 guests, with 4 cabins (1 luxurious Master, 1 luxurious VIP, 1 Double and 1 covertible cabin) each boasting end-suite bathrooms and other luxurious amenities. 

Experience the thrill of speed with the powerful twin engines, which offer an impressive top speed of 25 knots. The spacious fly-bridge is the perfect place to enjoy in the sun or lounge on comfortable beds with panoramic views of the sea and sky. If you are looking for a one-of-a-kind yacht that delivers style, comfort , and luxury, then the Phantom is a perfect choice. Indulge in Adriatic sea with confidence and enjoy a memorable experience that will last a lifetime.

This luxury yacht did a complete refit for the 2025 season in Croatia. Complete interior and exterior are new. All technical features are new: high-end sound system, navigation system, starlink wifi, the entire yacht shines with a new teak deck, as well as with new cushions and covers in the bow area. For a first-class experience, you will be able to enjoy the new TVs in all cabins.
NOTICE: Sunbeds are available when a 4.5 m RIB tender or chase tender is in use.

blueprint.name: PHANTOM
blueprint.engines: 2 x MAN D2842 LE 406 with kW (together two  engines 1764 kW)

amenities.label: Sunbeds - available only when chase tender is in use.

entertainment: All staterooms with SONY flat TV
tenders: Chase Tender (Ranieri Cayman 26 with Mercury Verado 250 KS) available on request, for additional surcharge. *Sunbeds are available when chase tender is in use.

crew.name: Ivan Milić
crew.bio:
After graduating Maritime University and obtaining highest degrees, Ivan spent the last eight years in the yachting industry, building extensive experience navigating the Adriatic. Being connected with sea all his life, pursuing a career in maritime was a natural choice. His expertise in navigation, safety, and hospitality ensures that every journey is both secure and enjoyable for his guests. He is fluent in English.
As a captain of the younger generation, he blends traditional seamanship with a modern, dynamic approach. His calm personality, strong leadership skills, and professional yet welcoming attitude create an atmosphere of trust and comfort on board. Passionate about working with people, he sees every trip as an opportunity to share his knowledge while continuously improving himself. With a focus on safety and excellence, he ensures an unforgettable yacht charter experience for all who come aboard.

crew.name: Lucija Kamenjarin
crew.bio:
After spending five years working on boats, including the last three in the yachting industry, Lucija has gained valuable experience and a strong understanding of life on board. She is fluent in English, extremely professional, pleasant and discrete hostess. She plays an important role in ensuring smooth daily operations and a comfortable environment for guests.

With a degree in educational rehabilitation, she takes special interest in working with children, creating a positive and engaging environment for them on board. Her ability to connect with young guests adds to the overall experience, making their time on the yacht enjoyable. Committed to both her work and the people she interacts with, Lucija approaches every day on board with enthusiasm and a strong sense of responsibility, always striving to make each journey a pleasant and memorable one.

crew.name: Duje Ivancev
crew.bio:
Duje is young but already experienced chef with lots of experience in haute cuisine at high standard hotels and yachts. In his work, he always strives for a balance between the wishes of guests and great culinary dishes he can offer. Duje speaks English very well, he is very polite and discrete person, yet a very open for discussing any gastromomic ideas.
During his studies, he attended practical classes at the famous Split restaurants Caper and Movi where he later took his first mandate as a chef. He participated in numerous competitions, won many and finally graduated as MASTER CHEF at Croatian Chamber of Crafts. 
Since being a child, Duje felt a passion for cooking and knew he will become a chef in the future. For the last seven years, that is his passion and profession. He spent all his time on the Adriatic islands and fall in love with the sea and seafood. His specialty is the Mediterranean cuisine but later on, he learnt a lot about several major regions, including Asian cuisine that he outstandingly combines with the Mediterranean one. During your stay on PHANTOM you will enjoy in his magnificent food.
